activities.title: Platform Evaluation Matrix
instructions: Rate each AIA platform pillar for your venture
Note build-yourself cost if platform were unavailable
Identify top 3 pillars for your launch

activities.title: Economic Engine Reflection
instructions: After platform section, review compensation as venture fuel
Draft how income supports your growth flywheel
Avoid 'join for money' framing — write 'engine that powers the venture'

activities.title: Why I Chose AIA — Platform Rationale
instructions: Write platform choice in entrepreneur language
Include at least three pillars with venture-specific rationale
Peer review: platform or employer mindset?
